---
title: "UDC Export Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · udc_export.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/udc/udc_export.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/udc/udc_export.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/udc/udc_export.schema.json`
:::

## Description

JSON Schema for validating UDC export configurations

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `export_config` | object | ✓ |  |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="udc_export.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "https://uiao.gov/schemas/udc/udc_export.schema.json",
  "title": "UDC Export Schema",
  "description": "JSON Schema for validating UDC export configurations",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "export_config"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "export_config": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "formats",
        "export_dir"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "formats": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "required": [
              "format",
              "enabled",
              "tool"
            ],
            "properties": {
              "format": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "docx",
                  "pdf",
                  "pptx",
                  "xlsx",
                  "md",
                  "html"
                ]
              },
              "description": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "enabled": {
                "type": "boolean"
              },
              "tool": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "naming_convention": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "pattern": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "sanitize": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "lowercase": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "replace_spaces": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        },
        "export_dir": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "integrity": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "hash_algorithm": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "sha256",
                "sha512"
              ]
            },
            "generate_manifest": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "manifest_file": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "immutable": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "verify_on_read": {
              "type": "boolean"
            }
          }
        },
        "artifact_upload": {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "enabled": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "retention_days": {
              "type": "integer"
            },
            "compress": {
              "type": "boolean"
            },
            "compression_format": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
```
